mapper.update: /* TM_PN50001_Dao_saveRecIssList */ MERGE INTO tm_pn50001 A USING ( SELECT #{prdctnYear} AS prdctn_year, #{recEqpCdNm} AS rec_eqp_cd_nm, #{mon01IemVu} AS mon01_iem_vu, #{mon02IemVu} AS mon02_iem_vu, #{mon03IemVu} AS mon03_iem_vu, #{mon04IemVu} AS mon04_iem_vu, #{mon05IemVu} AS mon05_iem_vu, #{mon06IemVu} AS mon06_iem_vu, #{mon07IemVu} AS mon07_iem_vu, #{mon08IemVu} AS mon08_iem_vu, #{mon09IemVu} AS mon09_iem_vu, #{mon10IemVu} AS mon10_iem_vu, #{mon11IemVu} AS mon11_iem_vu, #{mon12IemVu} AS mon12_iem_vu, #{frstRgstrId} AS frst_rgstr_id, #{lastUpdusrId} AS last_updusr_id, #{updtRsn} AS updt_rsn FROM DUAL ) B ON ( A.prdctn_year = B.prdctn_year AND A.rec_eqp_cd_nm = B.rec_eqp_cd_nm ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET A.mon01_iem_vu = B.mon01_iem_vu, A.mon02_iem_vu = B.mon02_iem_vu, A.mon03_iem_vu = B.mon03_iem_vu, A.mon04_iem_vu = B.mon04_iem_vu, A.mon05_iem_vu = B.mon05_iem_vu, A.mon06_iem_vu = B.mon06_iem_vu, A.mon07_iem_vu = B.mon07_iem_vu, A.mon08_iem_vu = B.mon08_iem_vu, A.mon09_iem_vu = B.mon09_iem_vu, A.mon10_iem_vu = B.mon10_iem_vu, A.mon11_iem_vu = B.mon11_iem_vu, A.mon12_iem_vu = B.mon12_iem_vu, A.last_updt_dt = SYSDATE, A.last_updusr_id = B.last_updusr_id, A.updt_rsn = B.updt_rsn WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( A.prdctn_year, A.rec_eqp_cd_nm, A.mon01_iem_vu, A.mon02_iem_vu, A.mon03_iem_vu, A.mon04_iem_vu, A.mon05_iem_vu, A.mon06_iem_vu, A.mon07_iem_vu, A.mon08_iem_vu, A.mon09_iem_vu, A.mon10_iem_vu, A.mon11_iem_vu, A.mon12_iem_vu, A.frst_regist_dt, A.frst_rgstr_id, A.last_updt_dt, A.last_updusr_id, A.updt_rsn ) VALUES ( B.prdctn_year, B.rec_eqp_cd_nm, B.mon01_iem_vu, B.mon02_iem_vu, B.mon03_iem_vu, B.mon04_iem_vu, B.mon05_iem_vu, B.mon06_iem_vu, B.mon07_iem_vu, B.mon08_iem_vu, B.mon09_iem_vu, B.mon10_iem_vu, B.mon11_iem_vu, B.mon12_iem_vu, SYSDATE, B.frst_rgstr_id, SYSDATE, B.last_updusr_id, B.updt_rsn )
